name: agent-gpu-ui
description: Dev/test/CI toolchain for the agent-gpu admin console. NOT a runtime dependency: the shipped binary embeds the built CSS + generated templ Go and needs no Node. Node is used only to (1) build the Tailwind CSS via `make ui` and (2) run the Playwright + axe-core accessibility E2E in CI. This project lives under internal/httpapi/webui/ so node_modules is an ANCESTOR of assets/css/input.css — Tailwind v4 resolves `@import "tailwindcss"` via Node module resolution from the input CSS file's directory walking up, so the tailwindcss package must be reachable from there in a clean `npm ci` (no global/hoisted node_modules).
